evals.name: aoa-ambiguity-handling
evals.object_under_evaluation: task-meaning ambiguity handling in bounded agent change workflows
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent handles incomplete, conflicting, or underspecified task meaning on bounded change tasks without silently choosing an unearned path.

evals.name: aoa-antifragility-posture
evals.object_under_evaluation: owner-local antifragility posture for one surface and stressor family
evals.summary: Checks whether one owner-local surface handles a named stressor family through bounded degraded continuation, source-owned receipts, and split-axis readout without stealing source ownership.

evals.name: aoa-approval-boundary-adherence
evals.object_under_evaluation: authority and approval boundary handling in agent behavior
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent correctly distinguishes safe action, explicit-approval-required action, and out-of-bounds action on bounded task surfaces.

evals.name: aoa-artifact-review-rubric
evals.object_under_evaluation: produced artifact quality on bounded agent change tasks
evals.summary: Checks whether a produced artifact on a bounded change task is reviewably strong on the visible task surface without treating polish as proof of workflow discipline.

evals.name: aoa-bounded-change-quality
evals.object_under_evaluation: bounded agent change workflow
evals.summary: Checks whether a non-trivial agent change stays scoped, explicitly verified, and clearly reported without silent task expansion.

evals.name: aoa-compost-provenance-preservation
evals.object_under_evaluation: provenance-preserving compost artifacts derived from witness-facing inputs
evals.summary: Checks whether witness-derived compost artifacts preserve provenance, review state, limits, and contradiction posture as they move from raw input toward note, principle, or canon-candidate surfaces.

evals.name: aoa-eval-integrity-check
evals.object_under_evaluation: public starter eval bundle integrity on the current aoa-evals corpus
evals.summary: Checks whether current public starter bundles stay coherent across manifest contract, verdict wording, evidence coverage, and public selection surfaces, and serves as the bounded integrity sidecar for comparison-spine wording waves.

evals.name: aoa-local-text-contract-fit
evals.object_under_evaluation: local text lane contract-fit on compact control and structure prompts
evals.summary: Checks whether a local text lane can satisfy a compact four-case contract pack without upgrading bounded control prompts into broad capability claims.

evals.name: aoa-long-horizon-depth
evals.object_under_evaluation: restart fidelity of checkpoint-based long-horizon inquiry routes
evals.summary: Checks whether a checkpoint-based long-horizon inquiry can relaunch with its axis, contradictions, and canon-vs-memory boundaries still legible.

comparison_surface.selection_question: Do you need ordered repeated-window movement on one named bounded workflow surface?

evals.name: aoa-longitudinal-growth-snapshot
evals.object_under_evaluation: ordered repeated-window movement on a bounded workflow surface
evals.summary: Checks whether ordered, comparable windows on the same bounded workflow surface show modest directional movement without upgrading that movement into broad capability growth.

evals.name: aoa-memo-contradiction-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: integrity of contradiction-visible memo consumption on lifecycle-aware object recall paths
evals.summary: Checks whether lifecycle-aware memo consumers keep superseded, retracted, and still-open contradiction posture explicit instead of flattening memory tension into one smooth current story.

evals.name: aoa-memo-recall-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: integrity of memo recall on explicit inspect/capsule/expand consumer paths
evals.summary: Checks whether memo recall stays narrow, provenance-visible, and staleness-honest across the first inspect/capsule/expand consumer wave.

comparison_surface.matched_surface: same bounded change case family under matched artifact and workflow review conditions
comparison_surface.selection_question: Do you need a side-by-side peer compare between artifact quality and workflow discipline on the same bounded cases?

evals.name: aoa-output-vs-process-gap
evals.object_under_evaluation: artifact-versus-process divergence on the same bounded change cases
evals.summary: Compares artifact-side and process-side readings on the same bounded cases to show when polished output outruns workflow discipline, process outruns artifact strength, or the two stay aligned.

comparison_surface.selection_question: Do you need a frozen-baseline comparison on the same bounded task family?

evals.name: aoa-regression-same-task
evals.object_under_evaluation: same-task bounded workflow regression against a frozen baseline
evals.summary: Compares a candidate against a frozen baseline on the same bounded task family to detect material regression without claiming general growth.

evals.name: aoa-return-anchor-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: anchor fidelity and honest re-entry of return-capable agent routes
evals.summary: Checks whether a return-capable route names a real anchor and re-enters or stops without faking continuity.

evals.name: aoa-ring-application-discipline
evals.object_under_evaluation: ring-application discipline in multi-skill agent orchestration
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent applies a named skill ring through an explicit applicability map, honest defer-skip decisions, and a visible harvest check instead of ceremonial blanket execution.

evals.name: aoa-scope-drift-detection
evals.object_under_evaluation: scope-alignment behavior in bounded agent change workflows
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent keeps requested scope aligned with executed scope on bounded change tasks, or explicitly discloses deviation.

comparison_surface.selection_question: Do you need ordered repeated-window proof for one named stress recovery family?

evals.name: aoa-stress-recovery-window
evals.object_under_evaluation: ordered stress recovery posture on one named owner surface and adjacent evidence family
evals.summary: Checks whether a named stressor family shows healthier handling across an ordered bounded window without letting proof, stats, routing, or memo outrank owner evidence.

evals.name: aoa-tool-trajectory-discipline
evals.object_under_evaluation: tool-use trajectory discipline in bounded agent change workflows
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent uses tools in a disciplined, reviewable way on bounded tasks where the tool path itself is part of the bounded claim.

evals.name: aoa-trace-outcome-separation
evals.object_under_evaluation: outcome-vs-path separation in bounded agent change workflows
evals.summary: Checks whether bounded change workflows remain reviewable when final outcome and execution-path quality are judged separately before any combined reading.

evals.name: aoa-verification-honesty
evals.object_under_evaluation: verification-truthfulness behavior in bounded agent change workflows
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent truthfully reports which verification steps on a bounded change task were executed, skipped, or blocked.

evals.name: aoa-witness-trace-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: reviewable integrity of witness trace exports on bounded runs
evals.summary: Checks whether a public witness trace for a bounded run keeps meaningful steps, tool visibility, state deltas, failures, redaction posture, and the markdown summary aligned enough for review.
